service.name: cloudflare
service.description: Cloudflare API for managing DNS, zones, and security

intents.description: List all zones (domains) in the Cloudflare account

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of zones per page (default 20, max 50)

response.description: Paginated list of zone objects with name, status, and name servers

intents.description: Create a DNS record for a zone
patterns: create DNS record {type} {name} pointing to {content} in zone {zone_id}

params.name: zone_id
params.description: The zone ID to create the record in

params.name: type
params.description: DNS record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, etc.)

params.name: name
params.description: DNS record name (e.g. example.com or sub.example.com)

params.name: content
params.description: DNS record content (e.g. IP address or target hostname)

params.name: proxied
params.description: Whether the record is proxied through Cloudflare (default false)

intents.description: List DNS records for a zone

params.name: zone_id
params.description: The zone ID to list records for

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by record type (A, CNAME, etc.)

response.description: Paginated list of DNS record objects
